card.name: Lord Fredrik, the Snowmad King
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Ward {2} When Lord Fredrik enters, put two stun counters on each tapped nonland permanent your opponents control. Whenever Lord Fredrik attacks, draw a card for each tapped nonland permanent defending player controls, then discard a card.

card.name: Jr. Troopa, Recurring Boss
card.text: Menace Whenever Jr. Troopa or another legendary creature dies, clear a stage. (When you clear a stage, draw a card, then discard a card. Every third stage you clear, you clear a world. Draw a card and create a Treasure token instead.)

card.name: Spoiled Rotten, Eggplant Brat
card.text: Whenever one or more tokens you control enter, create a 1/1 black Minion creature token with "This token can't block." This ability triggers only once each turn. Whenever Spoiled Rotten attacks, you may sacrifice up to two other creatures. For each creature sacrificed this way, draw a card.

card.name: Lava Moat Blargg
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, each opponent sacrifices an artifact of their choice. Then this creature deals 3 damage to each opponent. It deals 6 damage to each opponent who didn't sacrifice an artifact with mana value 3 or greater this way instead.

card.name: Spike
card.text: Whenever this creature or a commander you control attacks, for each opponent, create a 1/1 black Minion creature token with "This token can't block" that's tapped and attacking that player.

card.name: Tokotoko Speedster
card.text: Haste Whenever this creature attacks while you control a commander, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn.

card.name: Big Urchin
card.text: Flash Deathtouch When this creature enters, you may sacrifice another creature you control. If you do, you draw a card and this creature gains lifelink and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Bowser, King Koopa
card.text: Trample Other Minions, Nobles, and Villains you control have trample and haste. At the beginning of combat on your turn, create a 2/1 red Robot Minion artifact creature token. Partner—Cross Villains (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

card.name: Bowser's Chance Time
card.text: Each player rolls two six-sided dice. For each opponent, Bowser's Chance Time deals damage to that player equal to the difference between the total of their results and the total of your results. If less than 3 damage is dealt to that player this way, you create X Treasure tokens, where X is 3 minus the amount of damage dealt to that player.

card.name: Captain Syrup, Black Sugar Bandit
card.text: First strike Whenever you or a spell or permanent you control becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, create a Treasure token. Sacrifice five Treasures: Gain control of target artifact. Untap it.

card.name: Kamek, Chief Magikoopa
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast a spell that shares a creature type with your commander, you surveil 1 and Kamek deals 1 damage to each opponent. If that spell is your commander, instead you surveil 3 and Kamek deals 3 damage to each opponent. Partner—Cross Villains (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

card.name: The Koopalings, Mean Mob
card.text: Flying, menace At the beginning of your end step, each opponent who lost life this turn faces a villainous choice — That player loses 4 life and discards a card at random, or each of your other opponents loses 4 life and you draw a card.

card.name: Madame Broode, Wedding Manager
card.text: Protection from Dogs When Madame Broode enters, target opponent creates Chompikins, a legendary 6/6 Dog Minion artifact creature token with "Whenever you lose life, each opponent who controls a Noble gains that much life" and "Whenever you discard one or more cards, each opponent who controls a Noble draws that many cards."

card.name: Marx, Star Jester
card.text: Flying, lifelink Whenever Marx deals combat damage to a player, exile that many cards from the top of that player's library. You may cast a spell from among them without paying its mana cost. Partner—Cross Villains (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

card.name: Topmaniac, Battlerock King
card.text: Haste Whenever a creature you control with haste attacks, Topmaniac deals 1 damage to target player or planeswalker. If you were dealt damage this way, put a +1/+1 counter on Topmaniac.

card.name: Minion SMC
card.text: This token can't block.

card.name: Minion SMC
card.text: This token can't block.

card.name: Minion SMC
card.text: This token can't block.

card.name: Minion SMC
card.text: This token can't block.

card.name: Treasure SMC
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: 3-Up Moon
card.text: Return each creature card with mana value 3 or less and up to one Hero or Noble card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Exile this spell.

card.name: Alternate Costumes
card.text: Whenever you cast an Aura spell, look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal an Aura card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Lakilester, Cool Cloud Rider
card.text: Flying As long as Lakilester is attacking, prevent all combat damage that would be dealt to other attacking creatures you control. At the beginning of each end step, if damage was prevented this turn, create two 1/1 red Turtle Egg creature tokens with "This token can't block"

card.name: Stella, Sparkle Sprite
card.text: Flash Flying You may cast enchantment spells as though they had flash.

card.name: Tayce T., Toad Town Cook
card.text: When Tayce T. enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, create a Food token. Whenever you gain life, create a Super token attached to up to one target creature you control. (It's a colorless Aura enchantment token with enchant creature and "Enchanted creature gets +1/+1.")

card.name: Tippi, Helpful Pixl
card.text: Flying Whenever Tippi or another legendary permanent you control enters, you gain 1 life and draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Blast Off!
card.text: Each commander creature you control gets +X/+0 and gain first strike and haste until end of turn. Flashback {X}{R}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Bobbery, Salty Sea Dog
card.text: Whenever a source you control deals excess noncombat damage to a creature you don't control, Bobbery deals twice that much damage to that creature's controller. Bomb — {3}{R}: Bobbery deals 2 damage to target creature you don't control.

card.name: Daisy, Sport Superstar
card.text: Menace Whenever you cast an enchantment spell, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn. This ability triggers only once each turn. Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, put a +1/+1 counter on Daisy.

card.name: Double Cherries
card.text: Enchant creature Enchant creature has myriad. Those tokens aren't legendary. Stock

card.name: Paper Mario, Team Player
card.text: Menace Whenever Paper Mario attacks, you may exert him. When you do, copy up to two other triggered abilities you control. You may choose new targets for those abilities. (An exerted creature won't untap during your next untap step.)

card.name: Watt, Baby Spark
card.text: Whenever another legendary creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on Watt. As long as Watt has three or more counters on her, she has first strike As long as Watt has six or more counters on her, she has double strike.

card.name: Dreamy Giant Form
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +3/+3 and is a Giant in addition to its other types. Whenever an enchanted creature or enchantment creature you control deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.

card.name: Giant Wiggler
card.text: Indestructible When this creature enters, clear a stage for each creature you control with power 4 or greater. (When you clear a stage, draw a card, then discard a card. Every third stage you clear, you clear a world. Draw a card and create a Treasure token instead.)

card.name: Hungry Luma
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast an enchantment spell with mana value greater than this creature's power, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, draw a card, then you can put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Prince Florian, Wriggly Wonder
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Permanent spells you control can't be countered. {T}: Add {G}. {3}{G}, {T}: Whenever an enchanted creature you control deals combat damage to a player this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Star Festival
card.text: Enchant land you control As this Aura enters, choose a color. Untap enchanted land during each opponent's untap step. Whenever enchanted land is tapped for mana, add one mana of the chosen color.

card.name: Super Cyclone Bros.
card.text: Choose three. You can choose the same mode more than once. • Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target enchantment.

card.name: Call the Theets
card.text: Flash Enchant creature When this aura enters, create X 1/1 white Performer creature tokens. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 for each creature you control.

card.name: Captive Peach
card.text: Captive Peach enters under the control of an opponent of your choice. Captive Peach can't attack or block. Whenever a creature attacks you, untap it. It gains menace until end of turn. {5}, Sacrifice Captive Peach: Her owner draws a card and creates two Treasure tokens. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: DK & Diddy
card.text: This spell can't be countered Trample, haste Whenever DK & Diddy attacks, double each other attacking creature's power until end of turn.

card.name: Duck Hunt Duo
card.text: Flying Clay Shooting — Whenever one or more commanders you control attack, Duck Hunt Duo deals 2 damage to each defending player. Create a Treasure token for each player dealt damage this way. Partner—Cross Heroes (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

card.name: The Fabled Giga Bell
card.text: Enchant legendary creature you control Auras you control have hexproof and indestructible. Enchanted creature gets +10/+10 and can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.

card.name: Friendly Footrace
card.text: All creatures can attack your opponents as though those creatures had haste. Creatures that entered this turn and that aren't attacking you get +1/+0 and have trample.

card.name: Geno, Star-Powered Puppet
card.text: Haste Shooting Star Shot — Whenever Geno attacks for the first time each turn, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn. Then if you control three or more attacking enchanted creatures, untap all attacking creatures. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: Gold Skin
card.text: Enchant creature or Vehicle Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has ward {2} and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create that many Treasure tokens."

card.name: Hammer Suit
card.text: This spell costs {X} less to cast, where X is its target's power. Enchant creature Enchanted creature has base power 6 and has trample and lifelink.

card.name: Kooper, Power Shell
card.text: Vigilance Kooper enters with a shield counter on him. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) When Kooper enters, put a shield counter on each other modified creature you control. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: Luigi, Second Banana
card.text: Whenever an Aura enters attached to Luigi, you may create a token that's a copy of it attached to another target legendary creature you control. Partner—Cross Heroes (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

card.name: Mallow, Lost Prince
card.text: Reach Whenever you sacrifice an enchantment, Mallow deals 2 damage to any target and you gain 2 life. {2}{R}{G}, Sacrifice an Aura with mana value 1 or greater: Discover X, where X is that Aura's mana value. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Mario, Superstar
card.text: Whenever Mario attacks, create a tapped Treasure token for each Aura attached to him. Partner—Cross Heroes (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

card.name: Peachette, Super Crowned
card.text: Flying At the beginning of your end step, return target Aura card from your graveyard to your hand if you attacked with a commander this turn.

card.name: Prince Peasley, Flamboyant Bean
card.text: Flying Untap each enchanted permanent you control during each opponent's untap step. Whenever you attack, for each defending player, tap target creature that player controls.

card.name: Starshroom
card.text: Flying, lifelink Starshroom gets +1/+0 for each other creature and/or enchantment you control. When this Vehicle enters, create a 1/1 green and white Fungus Hero Creature token with Vigilance and a 1/1 colorless Star enchantment creature token with flying. Crew 2

card.name: Super Princess Peach
card.text: As Super Princess Peach enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, choose one. Peach and each enchanted creature you control have the last chosen ability. • Joy — Flying • Rage — First strike • Gloom — Deathtouch • Calm — Lifelink

card.name: Vivian, Shadow Sister
card.text: Veil — At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains indestructible until end of turn. Fiery Hex — During your turn, double all damage commanders you control would deal to your opponents and to permanents your opponents control.

card.name: Yoshi Kid
card.text: Vigilance Whenever Yoshi Kid enters or attacks, choose a kind of counter at random that he doesn't have on him from among first strike, menace, reach, and trample. Put a counter of that kind on Yoshi Kid. If he has a counter of each of those kinds on him, put two +1/+1 counters on him instead.

card.name: Copy SMC
card.text: (This token can be used to represent a token that's a copy of a permanent.)

card.name: Star SMC
card.text: Flying

card.name: Super SMC
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1.

card.name: Turtle Egg SMC
card.text: This token can't block.

card.name: Food SMC
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Kamek's Toadies
card.text: Flying, vigilance Other attacking Minions, Nobles, and Villains you control get +1/+0 and have flying. {4}{U}: Draw a card. Create a 1/1 black Minion creature token with "This token can't block."

card.name: Lord Crump, X-Naut Second
card.text: Minion, Noble, and Villain spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. For each creature you control with expendable, increase its expendable value by 1. (For example, if that creature has expendable {1}, it becomes expendable 2 and you create a 2/2 Minion when it dies. If a creature has multiple instances of expendable, increase each one separately.)

card.name: General Guy, Toy Box Terror
card.text: When General Guy enters, create a number of 1/1 black Minion creature token with "This token can't block" equal to the number of opponents you have. Charge! — Tap three untapped creatures you control: General Guy deals 2 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Cackletta, Beanbean Witch
card.text: First strike Steal Voice — Whenever Cackletta attacks, each noncommander creature defending player controls loses all abilities until your next turn.

card.name: Reznor, Dino-Rhino Wheel
card.text: When Reznor enters, create three 3/3 black Minion creature tokens with "This token can't block." Whenever a token you control leaves the battlefield, each opponent loses 2 life.

card.name: King Whomp
card.text: Trample Topple — When King Whomp enters, he deals damage to each opponent equal to twice the number of nonbasic lands that player controls. Each player dealt damage this way sacrifices a nonbasic land of their choice.

card.name: Wonder Rush
card.text: The next time you attack with one or more noncreature tokens this turn, create that many 1/1 black Minion creature tokens with "This token can't block" that are attacking. Then untap each attacking creature you control. After that combat phase, there's an additional combat phase. Exile Wonder Rush.

card.name: The Shadow Queen
card.text: Indestructible Whenever you play a land or cast a spell, draw a card. At the beginning of your end step, you lose half your life, rounded up, unless you sacrifice three other creatures.

card.name: Dry Bowser
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Trample, haste Whenever Dry Bowser attacks, mill three cards. You may play one of those cards this turn.

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Turtle Dragon Skeleton Noble

card.name: Chompikins SMC
card.text: Whenever you lose life, each opponent who controls a Noble gains that much life. Whenever you discard one or more cards, each opponent who controls a Noble draws that many cards.

card.name: Shadow Mario
card.text: You may have Shadow Mario enter as a copy of any creature on the battlefield, except it's an Ooze Minion in addition to its other types, it isn't legendary, and it has expendable 3.

card.name: Bowser Jr., Terrible Tyke
card.text: Whenever Bowser Jr. enters or attacks, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, goad one or two target creatures. (Until your next turn, that creature attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.) Goaded creatures get +1/+0 and have first strike and "This creature can't block."

card.name: Gooper Blooper
card.text: When this creature enters, tap target creature or artifact you don't control and put two stun counters on it. Encore {6}{U}{U} ({6}{U}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: For each opponent, create a token copy that attacks that opponent this turn if able. They gain haste. Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Burning Bridges
card.text: Starting with the next opponent in turn order, each opponent separates all creatures they control into three piles. For each opponent, choose one of their piles. Each player sacrifices all chosen permanents they control. (Piles can be empty.)

card.name: The Ba-Boom Brothers
card.text: Sneak {3}{U}{U} (You may cast this spell for {3}{U}{U} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. They enter tapped and attacking.) The Ba-Boom Brothers can't be blocked. Whenever The Ba-Boom Brothers deal combat damage to a player, goad target creature that player controls. If they entered this turn, goad each creature that player controls instead.

card.name: Wonder Smackerel
card.text: Flash Minion Offering (You may cast this spell as though it had flash by sacrificing a Minion and paying the difference in mana costs between this and the sacrificed Minion. Mana cost includes color.) When this creature enters, if it was cast for its offering cost, return each other creature and spell with lesser mana value than the offered permanent to their owner's hands.

card.name: Kamek's Library
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, draw a card if you created a token this turn. {3}{U}: Until end of turn, target legendary creature you control gains "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a token that's a copy of it except it's not legendary and is a 1/1."

card.name: King Hisstocrat
card.text: Menace, deathtouch Whenever one or more tokens you control deal combat damage to a player, that player gets two poison counters. If King Hisstocrat dealt damage to that player this turn, they get four poison counters instead. (A player with ten or more poison counters loses the game.)

card.name: Wingo, Thieving Roc
card.text: Flying, vigilance Spells you cast from anywhere other than your hand cost {1} less to cast Whenever Wingo attacks, defending player exiles the top card of their library.You may play that card until you exile another card with Wingo.

card.name: Madame Grape
card.text: Flying, lifelink Sour Grapes — Whenever you gain life, you may pay twice that much life. If you do, draw a card for each 1 life you gained. The Ultimate Tragedy — Whenever a player loses the game, put four +1/+1 counters on Madame Grape.

card.name: Bowser's Muscle Car V2
Volcano Wario's Deflection
card.text: You may cast this spell without paying its mana cost if it targets a spell or ability targeting your commander. You may choose new targets for target spell or ability with only one target. This spell deals 2 damage to that spell or ability's controller.

card.name: King Boo, Haunted Hotelier
card.text: Flying, deathtouch Whenever King Boo attacks, you and defending player each reveal the top card of your library. You lose life equal to the lowest mana value among those cards and defending player loses life equal to the greatest mana value among them. Then you each draw a card.
